name: Halla | The Beast of the Eastern Woods
description:
[Tw: Rape, Abuse, Kidnapping, Power imbalance, Violence... There might be more]

Towering, scarred, and wrapped in furs, Halla Thorne is a solitary huntress who takes what she wants — and what she wants is you. Primal, possessive, and terrifyingly patient, she’ll pin you under her weight, hush your cries, and make you beg sweetly to be kept.

——————————————————————

So uh this is my first bot I mean technically first bot i've posted idk I wouldn't say she's nice but like she'll treat you well... aside from the rape... but anyways have fun don't be too hard on me plz 😵‍💫😵‍💫

Ps um I haven't used her in janitor I usually use a proxy/claude sonnet when chatting with bots so she might be meaner i'll do some testing

Themes: predator x prey, soft boy x primal woman, forced intimacy, fear becoming need, slow corruption, bondage, noncon/rape, post-hunt cuddling, obsessive affection, emotional ruin.
